page.title: Programs
page.description: Manage the programs available for this organization

createDialog.title: Create new program
createDialog.description: Start with the program name and description. Then you can configure its form, documents, and payments.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Briefly describe the goal, focus, or audience for this program.

icon.label: Program icon
icon.description: Choose the icon that will represent this program in the header, cards, and tables.

feedback.createSuccess: Program created. You can now configure its form, documents, and payments.
feedback.createError: Failed to create the program. Please try again.

programsGrid.emptyDescription: Create your first program to start defining its form, documents, and payments.

deleteDialog.title: Delete program
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This will also remove its default documents and charges and cannot be undone.

feedback.actionError: Could not update the program. Please try again.
feedback.deleteError: Could not delete the program. Please try again.

templatesTable.emptyMessage: There are no saved templates yet

deleteDialog.title: Delete template
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? If this template is already used by an application, it will be archived instead of deleted.

feedback.archived: Template archived. It was hidden from the list to avoid affecting existing applications.
feedback.deleteError: Could not delete the template. Please try again.

iconPicker.title: Choose program icon
iconPicker.description: Select the icon that best represents this program.

useTemplateDialog.title: Use template
useTemplateDialog.description: Choose a saved template to load its configuration into this program.

saveDialog.title: Save changes
saveDialog.description: Choose whether you want to save this form as a program, a template, or both.

targets.programDescription: Update this program with the current form changes.
targets.programAlreadySaved: There are no pending changes in the program right now.
targets.templateDescription: Create a reusable template for new programs.

editor.emptyDescription: Add elements to start building this program form.

command.title: Add element
command.description: Choose the type of element you want to add to the form.

Input.label: Input
Input.description: Single-line text, email, number, phone, or URL input.

Textarea.label: Textarea
Textarea.description: Multi-line text field for longer answers.

Switch.label: Switch
Switch.description: Toggle field for yes or no decisions.

Select.label: Select
Select.description: Dropdown field with a predefined set of options.

RadioGroup.label: Radio group
RadioGroup.description: Single-choice list where all options stay visible.

DatePicker.label: Date picker
DatePicker.description: Single date or date range selection.

Text.label: Text
Text.description: Heading or paragraph block for instructions.

Separator.label: Separator
Separator.description: Divider to organize sections of the form.

preview.singleStepDescription: Preview of the form users will complete.
preview.successDescription: This is how the form will behave when a user submits all required steps.

settings.title: Field settings
settings.description: Configure the behavior and content of the selected element.
settings.separatorHelp: You can use the label as optional text above the divider line.

validation.nameUnique: Each field name must be unique within the form.

documents.title: Document requirements
documents.description: Define the default documents that will be requested for applications using this program.
documents.saveProgramFirstDescription: Save the basic program information before defining the default documents for this program.
documents.emptyStateDescription: Add the default documents that should be requested for applications using this program.
documents.activeHint: This document will be requested by default for applications that use this program.
documents.hiddenHint: This document is saved in the program, but it is hidden by default.

payments.title: Charges and fees
payments.description: Here we will configure one-time and recurring payments associated with this program.
payments.saveProgramFirstDescription: Save the basic program information before defining the default charges for this program.
payments.emptyStateDescription: Add the default one-time and recurring charges that should be created for applications using this program.
payments.activeHint: These charges will be created by default for applications that use this program.

feedback.invalidFormDefinition: Fix the fields with empty or duplicate names before saving the form.
feedback.templateApplied: Template applied to the form. Remember to save the program if you want to keep the changes.
feedback.saveError: Failed to save the program. Please try again.
